system.damage: meaty hands d10+3 (hand, close, grabby, forceful) or tree trunk d10+5 (reach, area, crude, forceful) or hurled heavy thing d10+3 (thrown, forceful)
system.specialQuality: infectious blood; suffers from delusions, behaves erratically

selected: to spread its master’s influence > Fix someone with its evil eye, inflicting overwhelming delusions > Pluck things from the ground as if weightless > Obsessively carve its master’s sigils into things > Fly into a senseless rage > Spew forth an infectious, silvery cloud (reach, area, reload)
